history.content:
<thought>
Forward is lava, left is wall, right is empty floor. I will turn clockwise to face east so I can move to the safe cell on the right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The current observation does not show the goal. The cell directly in front (above) is a floor cell ('.'), so it is safe to move forward. Moving forward will allow me to explore more of the map and potentially find the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
O agente está na parte inferior central, voltado para o norte (para cima). A célula diretamente à frente (linha 6, coluna 4) é um piso seguro (.). As células ao redor são: à esquerda (linha 7, coluna 3) é lava, à direita (linha 7, coluna 5) é parede, e atrás (fora da vista) é desconhecido. Como não há objetivo visível, o melhor é avançar para explorar novas áreas. Mover-se para frente é seguro e pode revelar mais do mapa.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, and the cell directly ahead is a floor (.). There are no immediate threats in front. The goal is not visible in the current observation, so we need to explore. Moving forward is safe and will reveal more of the grid. Turning left would face lava, and turning right would face a wall, so moving forward is the best option.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at the bottom row, facing north. The cell directly in front (north) is floor (.), so I can safely move forward. To my left is lava, to my right is a wall. Currently, the goal is not visible in the observation. Moving forward will give me a better view of the area and potentially reveal the goal or a path.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
O agente está virado para o norte. A célula à frente (6,4) é um chão seguro, mas leva a um beco sem saída (parede ao norte). A célula à esquerda (7,3) é chão e parece conectar a uma área com mais células desconhecidas. Para explorar melhor, devo girar no sentido anti-horário para ficar virado para oeste.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is floor. The goal is at the top-right. I can move forward to advance towards the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (6,3) facing north. The cell directly in front is floor, so I can safely move forward. This will bring me closer to the goal. I plan to navigate north then east to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I need to reach the goal at (2,5). From my current position (6,3) facing north, the cell directly ahead (5,3) is safe (floor). Moving forward will bring me closer to the path that goes around the lava. I plan to move up twice, then right, then up twice, then right to the goal. So first step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at the bottom row, facing north. The cell directly in front of me (up) is floor (.), which is safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal while avoiding the surrounding lava cells. After this step, I can navigate around the obstacles to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, but the cell directly ahead is lava. Turning clockwise would face east, where the adjacent cell is floor. This allows us to move towards the goal which is to the east and north. Turning anti-clockwise would face west into lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (row7, col4) facing north. The goal O is at (row5, col2). The cell directly ahead (north) at (row6, col4) is a floor cell, safe to move. To reach the goal, we need to go north, then west twice, then north. The immediate safe step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at the position (row5, col1), which is one cell above and two cells to the left of my current location. Directly ahead (north) is an empty cell, but moving there would lead to a situation where the only safe moves are back or east, and the goal would be blocked by lava. A safer path is to move left first: turn to face west, then move left twice, and finally turn north to reach the goal. Therefore, the first step is to turn counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is a floor ('.'), and beyond that is another floor cell leading to the goal 'O' two steps north and one step east. Moving forward is safe and progresses towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom center (row 7, column 4), facing upwards. The goal 'O' is at (row 6, column 5), which is one row up and one column to the right. The cell directly in front (row 6, column 4) is a floor cell ('.'), safe to move into. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal. After this, I can turn clockwise to face east and then move into the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly to my right (east). The cell in front is a wall, so I cannot move forward. Turning clockwise will allow me to face east and then move onto the goal in the next step.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal 'O' is directly north of me at (6,4). Since I am facing north (indicated by the '^' symbol), the cell in front is the goal. There are no obstacles or lava in that cell. I can reach it by moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
